name: Miller Park Downtown Jackson
description: Dogs are not allowed at Miller Park
open_play_schedule: Courts open at 8AM, and are first come. Courts can be reserved by calling the Jackson Recreation Center for windows starting at 12pm.

name: Pickleball Garage
description: Pickleball Garage is a place to play pickleball in Jackson, WY. There are 2 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like trainers or lessons, restrooms, and water. You can reserve the courts.

name: Teton County-jackson Rec. Center
description: Teton County-jackson Rec. Center is a place to play pickleball in Jackson, WY. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.
